html:
Exclusive to:

The Bramble Bulb is an Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is dropped when a Bramble Bloom is destroyed, and can be used to craft Root Trunks and Dense Turf. Bramble Bulbs are also edible, restoring 9.4 and 1 when eaten. They take 20 Days to perish.

Usage

×2

×2

×3

Tips

  • Only seven Bramble Bulbs can be obtained per Lush Season.
    • By controlling the Aporkalypse Calendar during Lush Season, seven new Bramble Blooms can be forced to spawn in the world. This allows the player to obtain more than the usual seven Bramble Bulbs per Lush Season.
  • Bramble Bulbs can be stored in Bundling Wraps to prevent spoilage.

Trivia

  • Bramble Bulb was added in March 18, 2019 update.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

The Bramble Bulb is an Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is dropped when a Bramble Bloom is destroyed, and can be used to craft Root Trunks and Dense Turf. Bramble Bulbs are also edible, restoring 9.4 and 1 when eaten. They take 20 Days to perish.

Only seven Bramble Bulbs can be obtained per Lush Season.
By controlling the Aporkalypse Calendar during Lush Season, seven new Bramble Blooms can be forced to spawn in the world. This allows the player to obtain more than the usual seven Bramble Bulbs per Lush Season.
Bramble Bulbs can be stored in Bundling Wraps to prevent spoilage.

Bramble Bulb was added in March 18, 2019 update.

The '''Bramble Bulb''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is dropped when a [[Bramble Bloom]] is destroyed, and can be used to craft [[Root Trunk]]s and [[Dense Turf]]. Bramble Bulbs are also edible, restoring 9.4 {{Hunger}} and 1 {{hp}} when eaten. They take 20 [[Day]]s to perish.

== {{Pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1=Bramble Bulb
|count1=1
|item2=Ashes
|item3=Cut Grass
|count3=2
|result=Dense Turf
|tool = Alchemy Engine}}
{{Recipe
|item1=Bramble Bulb
|count1=1
|item2=Flytrap Stalk
|count2=2
|item3=Boards
|count3=3
|result=Root Trunk
|tool=Prestihatitator}}

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == 
* Only seven Bramble Bulbs can be obtained per [[Lush Season]].
** By controlling the [[Aporkalypse Calendar]] during Lush Season, seven new Bramble Blooms can be forced to spawn in the world. This allows the player to obtain more than the usual seven Bramble Bulbs per Lush Season.

* Bramble Bulbs can be stored in [[Bundling Wrap|Bundling Wraps]] to prevent spoilage.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Bramble Bulb was added in March 18, 2019 update.
